name: youtube-rush
description: **YouTube Rush** is a lightweight web extension designed to subtly improve the YouTube interface for long-form content and live streams. It automatically applies CSS tweaks to clean up distracting UI elements and enhance viewer focus—especially in fullscreen mode.

scripts.pack: npm run lint && node -e "const v=require('./manifest.json').version; const {execSync}=require('child_process'); const f='youtube-rush-v'+v+'.zip'; try{require('fs').unlinkSync(f)}catch(e){} execSync('zip -r '+f+' manifest.json css/ icons/ popup/', {stdio:'inherit'}); console.log('Created '+f);"
